hero.title: Sculpted in Gold. Defined by Brilliance.
hero.subtitle: Discover Trimetra's fine jewelry collection, handcrafted with conflict-free diamonds, grade-AAA pearls, and solid 18k gold.

brandStory.title: The Trimetra Story
paragraphs: Founded on the principles of design purity, mathematical precision, and exceptional hand-craftsmanship, Trimetra creates fine jewelry that transcends fleeting trends. The name Trimetra is derived from the fusion of symmetry, material integrity, and artistic vision.

Each design starts with a hand-drawn sketch and is brought to life by master artisans who have spent decades perfecting their craft. We source only the finest raw materials—ethically and sustainably—to ensure that every piece is not only beautiful but also a responsible heirloom for the future.

craftsmanship.title: Artisanal Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.subtitle: Where heritage techniques meet modern precision.
paragraphs: At Trimetra, we believe jewelry is a form of wearable sculpture. Our workshop blends age-old metalworking techniques—like hand-milgrain, detailed filigree, and claw-setting—with high-precision modern tools.

Every diamond and gemstone is inspected individually by our certified gemologists and hand-set under stereomicroscopes to ensure absolute stability and maximum brilliance. This meticulous attention to detail is why a Trimetra piece retains its fire and luster for a lifetime.

vision.title: Our Vision
paragraphs: To be a global beacon of responsible luxury, creating exquisite, high-end jewelry that honors the natural beauty of gemstones while upholding the highest standards of environmental and social ethics.
We aim to redefine modern heirlooms, making jewelry that tells a deeply personal story of elegance, power, and heritage.

testimonials.name: Sophia Varma
testimonials.text: The Aurelia Pendant is absolutely breath-taking. The filigree work is so delicate and catches the light beautifully. The experience of buying was seamless, and the custom WhatsApp consultation was incredibly helpful.

testimonials.name: Marcus & Elena Lindqvist
testimonials.text: We ordered the Empress Bridal Set for our wedding. The craftsmanship is flawless, and it felt like wearing a piece of art. Trimetra's team went above and beyond to deliver it ahead of schedule.

testimonials.name: Devika Sen
testimonials.text: I appreciate the transparency in material sourcing. Knowing my Colombian emerald drops are conflict-free makes them even more special. The weight and balance of the earrings are perfect.

whatsapp.message: Hello, I am visiting your website and would like to make an enquiry.

location.address: Penthouse Suite 4, The Diamond District, 5th Avenue, New York, NY 10017
location.hours: Mon - Sat: 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM (By Appointment Only)

founderStory.title: The Founder's Story
paragraphs: Trimetra was founded by Yashwardhan, a visionary gemologist and master jeweler. Intrigued by the intersection of natural mineral crystallization and classical geometric symmetry, Yashwardhan established Trimetra to revive mathematical purity in fine jewelry design.

"A gemstone is a window into the deep history of our planet," says Yashwardhan. "Our role as craftsmen is simply to build a perfect frame that honors that journey. At Trimetra, we combine mathematical symmetry with traditional hands-on carving to sculpt statements that endure."

brandJourney.title: Our Brand Journey
paragraphs: What began as a private appointment-only design studio in the heart of the Diamond District has grown into a renowned luxury house. Trimetra has maintained a steadfast refusal to participate in high-volume mass production. Instead, we remain a high-end workshop focusing on limited editions and custom commissions.
From our first iconic Aurelia necklace to our expansion into tiaras and cuffs, our brand has stayed true to local, clean manufacturing, preserving the slow-artistry of traditional jewelry setting.

items.title: Ethically Sourced Gems
items.desc: 100% of our diamonds, South Sea pearls, and emeralds are responsibly sourced from vetted mining cooperatives under conflict-free certification systems.

items.title: Generational Heirloom Weight
items.desc: Unlike mass-market hollow settings, every Trimetra piece is cast with substantial gold and platinum density, featuring double-pronged secure gemstone settings designed to last centuries.

items.title: Bespoke Design Atelier
items.desc: Our patrons enjoy direct access to our master designers. We specialize in custom ring sizing, gemstone upscaling, and personalized engraving options.

all.title: Fine Jewelry Collections
all.description: Discover our complete catalog of signature rings, necklaces, earrings, cuffs, and bridal jewelry handcrafted with conflict-free diamonds, grade-AAA pearls, and solid 18k gold.

necklaces.title: Necklaces & Pendants
necklaces.description: Elegantly draped chains, collars, and brilliant pendants handcrafted in 18k gold and platinum.

earrings.title: Earrings & Drops
earrings.description: From delicate studs to dramatic diamond drops, designed to capture light with every movement.

rings.title: Fine Rings & Bands
rings.description: Exquisite solitaire engagement rings, eternity bands, and custom statement rings.

bracelets.title: Bracelets & Cuffs
bracelets.description: Timeless tennis bracelets, structured cuffs, and delicate chain bracelets designed for everyday luxury.

bridal.title: The Bridal Collection
bridal.description: Heirloom-quality tiaras, sets, and engagement rings crafted to make your special day unforgettable.
